attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SPES.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID,
SPES.ORDER_LINE_ID,
SPES.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE,
SPES.GLOBAL_NAME,
SPES.THEATRE,
SPES.START_DATE,
SPES.EXPIRATION_DATE,
SPES.ENRICHMENT_CODE,
SPES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SPES.BATCH_ID,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CMA_TRX_PRTS_EXT_SOL SPES
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL   
	ON SPES.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
	AND SPES.GLOBAL_NAME = TRIM(NSOL.SS_CODE)
WHERE NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL

SELECT
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NP_SHIP_TO.PARTY_KEY AS SHIP_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
NP_BILL_TO.PARTY_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
NP_SOLD_TO.PARTY_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
CASE WHEN SPES.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_END_USER' THEN THEATRE  ELSE NULL END AS END_USER_THEATER_NAME,
CASE WHEN SPES.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_SHIP_TO' THEN THEATRE  ELSE NULL END  AS SHIP_TO_THEATER_NAME,
CASE WHEN SPES.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_SHIP_TO' THEN SPES.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE  ELSE NULL END   AS SRC_RPTD_SHP_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN SPES.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_BILL_TO' THEN SPES.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE  ELSE NULL END  AS SRC_RPTD_BIL_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN SPES.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_SOLD_TO' THEN SPES.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE ELSE NULL END  AS SRC_RPTD_SLD_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN SPES.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_END_USER' THEN SPES.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE  ELSE NULL END  AS SRC_RPTD_END_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
NP_END_USER.PARTY_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
CAST(START_DATE AS DATE) AS START_TV_DT,
CAST(EXPIRATION_DATE AS DATE) AS END_TV_DT 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CMA_TRX_PRTS_EXT_SOL SPES
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL   
	ON SPES.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
	AND SPES.GLOBAL_NAME = TRIM(NSOL.SS_CODE)
LEFT OUTER  JOIN 
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP_SHIP_TO
 ON SPES.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE=NP_SHIP_TO.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT   AND  NP_SHIP_TO.SS_CODE='CR' AND NP_SHIP_TO.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'  AND SPES.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_SHIP_TO'
LEFT OUTER  JOIN 
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP_SOLD_TO
 ON SPES.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE=NP_SOLD_TO.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT   AND  NP_SOLD_TO.SS_CODE='CR' AND NP_SOLD_TO.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'  AND SPES.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_SOLD_TO'
LEFT OUTER  JOIN 
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP_BILL_TO
 ON SPES.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE=NP_BILL_TO.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT   AND  NP_BILL_TO.SS_CODE='CR' AND NP_BILL_TO.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'  AND SPES.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_BILL_TO' 
LEFT OUTER  JOIN 
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP_END_USER
 ON SPES.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE=NP_END_USER.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT   AND  NP_END_USER.SS_CODE='CR' AND NP_END_USER.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'  AND SPES.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_END_USER'

SELECT 
ETPS.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID,
ETPS.ORDER_LINE_ID,
ETPS.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE,
ETPS.GLOBAL_NAME,
ETPS.THEATRE,
ETPS.START_DATE,
ETPS.EXPIRATION_DATE,
ETPS.ENRICHMENT_CODE,
ETPS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
ETPS.BATCH_ID
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CMA_TRX_PRTS_EXT_SOL ETPS 
WHERE
NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CMA_TRX_PRTS_EXT_SOL STPS
WHERE STPS.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID= ETPS.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID
)

SELECT
Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,N.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) , -999 ) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SHIP_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,N.SHIP_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY)  , -999 ) AS SHIP_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,N.BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY)  , -999 ) AS BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,N.SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY)  , -999 ) AS SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.END_USER_THEATER_NAME ,N.END_USER_THEATER_NAME)  , 'UNKNOWN' ) AS END_USER_THEATER_NAME,
Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SHIP_TO_THEATER_NAME ,N.SHIP_TO_THEATER_NAME)  , 'UNKNOWN' ) AS SHIP_TO_THEATER_NAME,
Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SRC_RPTD_SHP_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,N.SRC_RPTD_SHP_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) , -999 ) AS SRC_RPTD_SHP_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SRC_RPTD_BIL_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,N.SRC_RPTD_BIL_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) , -999 ) AS SRC_RPTD_BIL_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SRC_RPTD_SLD_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,N.SRC_RPTD_SLD_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) , -999 ) AS SRC_RPTD_SLD_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SRC_RPTD_END_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,N.SRC_RPTD_END_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) , -999 ) AS SRC_RPTD_END_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY ,N.END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY) , -999 ) AS END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
Coalesce (N.START_TV_DT , WI.START_TV_DT) AS START_TV_DT,
'3500-01-01' AS END_TV_DT,
'I'	  ACTION_CODE,
'I'	   DML_TYPE
FROM 
(
SELECT 
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
MAX( SHIP_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY) AS SHIP_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,
MAX( BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY) AS BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
MAX( SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY) AS SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
MAX(END_USER_THEATER_NAME) AS END_USER_THEATER_NAME,
MAX(SHIP_TO_THEATER_NAME) AS SHIP_TO_THEATER_NAME,
MAX( SRC_RPTD_SHP_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) AS SRC_RPTD_SHP_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
MAX( SRC_RPTD_BIL_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) AS SRC_RPTD_BIL_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
MAX(SRC_RPTD_SLD_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) AS SRC_RPTD_SLD_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
MAX(SRC_RPTD_END_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) AS SRC_RPTD_END_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
MAX( END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY) AS END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY , 
MIN(START_TV_DT) AS START_TV_DT 
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_RBK_CMA_ENRCH_SOL
GROUP BY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
) WI
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_RBK_CMA_ENRCH_SOL_TV N
ON 
WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = N.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
